fields.name: Classic
fields.description: A clean, traditional single-column layout with serif typography. ATS-friendly and perfect for formal industries like finance, law, and government.

fields.name: Modern
fields.description: A two-column layout with a dark sidebar for skills, languages, and certifications. Great for tech, creative, and startup roles.

fields.name: Compact
fields.description: A dense two-column layout optimized for candidates with extensive experience. Fits more content on a single page.

fields.name: Minimalist
fields.description: Ultra-clean design with generous whitespace, thin dividers, and light gray section headers. Lets your content speak for itself.

fields.name: Executive
fields.description: Dark navy header with gold accents and serif typography. A formal, traditional layout for senior professionals and executives.

fields.name: Creative
fields.description: A colorful coral sidebar with contact info, skills, and languages. The main area showcases experience and education. Perfect for creative roles.

fields.name: Tech
fields.description: Dark-themed with monospace fonts and teal accents. Features code-style section headers and tag-based skills. Built for developers and engineers.

fields.name: Academic
fields.description: Formal serif layout designed for researchers and academics. Emphasizes education, publications, and areas of expertise.

fields.name: Elegant
fields.description: Refined design with italic serif name, burgundy color scheme, and decorative dividers. A classic sophisticated look for any profession.

fields.name: Bold
fields.description: Heavy typography with strong contrast and amber accents. Thick colored left borders on sections make a powerful visual statement.

fields.name: Swiss
fields.description: Grid-based minimalist design inspired by Swiss typography. Clean two-column layout with red accent and strong typographic hierarchy.

fields.name: Corporate
fields.description: Professional blue and gray color scheme with structured corporate lines. A polished, business-ready layout for established professionals.

fields.name: Startup
fields.description: Modern casual feel with green accents and dashed dividers. Pill-style skills and an approachable design for the startup ecosystem.

fields.name: Writer
fields.description: Typography-focused editorial design with Georgia serif, warm brown accents, and a literary feel. Perfect for writers and editors.

fields.name: Finance
fields.description: Conservative dark blue with yellow accent bar and percentage-based skill bars. A numbers-focused layout for finance professionals.

fields.name: Engineer
fields.description: Technical structured look with orange accents and monospace elements. Grid-based skills with bracket styling for engineers.

fields.name: Medical
fields.description: Clean clinical white with teal accents. Professional medical look with clear sections for certifications and clinical qualifications.

fields.name: Marketing
fields.description: Bold colorful design with magenta accents and colored section backgrounds. Dynamic skill bars and chip-style languages.

fields.name: Designer
fields.description: Creative two-column layout with dark sidebar for skills and contact. Colorful skill tags and a portfolio-style presentation.

fields.name: Graduate
fields.description: Designed for fresh graduates with education section prominent at top. Clean layout with blue accents, ideal for internships and entry-level.

fields.name: Photographer
fields.description: Visual-first layout with dark header and warm amber accents. Portfolio-style description formatting for visual artists and photographers.

fields.name: Consultant
fields.description: Professional indigo scheme with skill progress bars and achievement-focused formatting. Results-driven layout for consultants.

fields.name: Lawyer
fields.description: Very formal dark charcoal with serif typography and traditional layout. Conservative professional look for legal professionals.

fields.name: Architect
fields.description: Structured grid-like layout with slate sidebar and clean geometric feel. Precise spacing for architects and designers.

fields.name: Journalist
fields.description: Editorial newspaper feel with black, white, and red accents. Serif headlines and dateline-style dates for media professionals.

fields.name: Researcher
fields.description: Modern academic design with deep purple accents. Publications-friendly with pill-style skills and clear research hierarchy.

fields.name: Flat
fields.description: Ultra-modern flat design with solid blue header bars, skill progress bars, and chip-style languages. Minimal and contemporary.
